calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify The Amendment And Restatement Of The Harry F. Hansen Revocable Living Trust
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Avid Alavi for David Keeler

Ms. Alavi stated the intention is for 50% interest to go to the nephew-Ronald, Ronald has one daughter, Marie got noticed, neither Ronald nor Marie want to come to court, and Robert was already deceased when the amendment was done. The Court noted the papers were not well drafted, and granted the petition to modify the amendment and restatement of Harry F. Hanson Revocable Living Trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.
